name: Peanut Butter Brownie Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix brownie batter according to package directions.
2. Fill paper-lined or foil-lined muffin cups two-thirds full.
3. Remove wrappers from peanut butter cups; place one in each muffin cup and press down until the batter meets the top edge of the candy.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes.
